name: Chicken and Pasta Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the first five ingredients in butter until the vegetables are crisp-tender.
2. Stir in tomatoes, basil, salt, and crushed red pepper; set aside.
3. Cook pasta according to package directions; drain.
4. Combine pasta, vegetable mixture, and chicken in a large bowl.
5. Spoon the mixture into an 11x7x1-1/2-inch baking dish.
6. In a medium saucepan, combine whipping cream and cheeses. Cook over low heat until cheese melts, stirring frequently.
7. Pour sauce over pasta mixture.
8. Bake, covered, at 350°F for 40 to 45 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
- Makes 6-8 servings.
